BatchConversionOfAnnualAndMonthlyPackage.action: The action to perform on the instance; current valid value: toPrepay
BatchConversionOfAnnualAndMonthlyPackage.config: Configuration for batch conversion to annual/monthly subscription, supporting up to 20 instances
BatchConversionOfAnnualAndMonthlyPackage.config.cdsList: (Deprecated. Pay-as-you-go CDS data disks attached to a BCC instance must be converted together.) List of associated data disks to convert. Defaults to empty; use "all" to include all associated data disks (e.g. "cdsList":["all"]). To convert only specific disks, provide their disk IDs.
BatchConversionOfAnnualAndMonthlyPackage.config.autoRenew: Whether to automatically renew the instance upon expiration. Valid values: **true**: auto-renew, **false**: do not auto-renew. Default: false.
BatchConversionOfAnnualAndMonthlyPackage.config.autoRenewPeriod: Duration of each automatic renewal (unit: months). Valid values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 12, 24, 36. Default: 1. This parameter takes effect only when autoRenew is true.
BatchConversionOfAnnualAndMonthlyPackage.config.autoPay: Whether to pay automatically. Default: true, indicating automatic payment.
